title: Files Gallery View Flexibility
excerpt: The Files Gallery is great, but the default sort seems to be by date added.  It would be incredibly helpful if you could add the 'Item" the file is attached to, as well as sort alphabetically, etc.

posts.author: chendrix (Cathy Hendrix)
posts.cookedHtml: The Files Gallery is great, but the default sort seems to be by date added. It would be incredibly helpful if you could add the 'Item" the file is attached to, as well as sort alphabetically, etc.
